concerns.analysis: The source document contains two meaningful handwritten signatures that serve as proof of adoption by the Clerk and the Chairman. While the names are present as text in the HTML, the visual representation of the signatures (images) is missing entirely from the output. In the context of a legal resolution, these signatures are meaningful visual content.

concerns.output_quote: The HTML contains no elements or placeholders corresponding to the handwritten signatures; only the plain text of the names is provided.
